issues.description: Filter missing required 'type' constraint. Card text specifies '[Pacifista]' type, but filter only has 'kind' and 'maxCost'. Must include type filter for Pacifista.
SearchDeck action missing shuffle step. Card text states 'then shuffle your deck' which must be represented as a separate action or shuffle directive.
'Once Per Turn' restriction not encoded in DSL. Condition should include turnLimit or similar constraint.
